agents.name: backend-agent
agents.description: Builds backend APIs and auth services. Use when implementing Django/DRF backend features and access-control flows.

agents.name: architect-agent
agents.description: Shapes system architecture and technical direction. Use when making cross-cutting backend design decisions and debt strategy.

agents.name: tester-agent
agents.description: Builds and evaluates test coverage. Use when writing pytest coverage and validating backend reliability behavior.

agents.name: reviewer-agent
agents.description: Performs strict project-aware code reviews. Use when evaluating PR quality, security, and convention adherence.

agents.name: planner-agent
agents.description: Plans roadmap execution and backlog priorities. Use when sequencing work and estimating effort from project constraints.

agents.name: researcher-agent
agents.description: Researches market and technical feasibility. Use when validating roadmap ideas against external evidence and ecosystem trends.
